Resources.description: The resources folder of the game. It is evaluated by cmake, so don't forget to re-configure cmake after changing it

StartResolution.description: The starting resolution of the window, can be [0, 0] if you've already precised a scaling resolution

ScalingResolution.description: The target scaled resolution of the window, set it to [0, 0] if you don't want any target scaling

TargetFPS.description: The target frametime of the runtime. Set it to 0 if you don't want to lock your FPS

AudioOptions.description: Object containing several options of the audio engine
